mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar AS avatar, f.create_time AS create_time FROM user_follow f INNER JOIN user u ON f.following_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND f.is_deleted = 0 AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar AS avatar, f.create_time AS create_time FROM user_follow f INNER JOIN user u ON f.follower_id = u.id WHERE f.following_id = #{userId} AND f.is_deleted = 0 AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT n.id, n.user_id, n.title, n.cover_image, n.scenic_id, n.like_count, n.status, n.create_time, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM travel_note n INNER JOIN user_follow f ON n.user_id = f.following_id INNER JOIN user u ON n.user_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND f.is_deleted = 0 AND n.is_deleted = 0 AND n.status = 1 ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
